title: 20 to >10.0 pts
content:
20 to >10.0 pts
Satisfactory
Post demonstrates adequate depth of understanding, but does not address all of discussion prompt; point of view is somewhat unclear and detail is limited.
10 to >0 pts
Needs Improvement
Post does not demonstrate depth of understanding of course content; Discussion prompt is minimally addressed; Point of view is unclear and detail is under-developed.
30 pts
This criterion is linked to a Learning OutcomeInitial Post: Timeliness
10 pts
Excellent
Submits initial post by deadline.
0 pts
Needs Improvement
Submits initial post late.
10 pts
This criterion is linked to a Learning OutcomeInitial Post: Spelling/Grammar/Mechanics
10 pts
Excellent
Post has 0-1 spelling or grammatical errors; Properly cites work in APA format where required.
5 pts
Satisfactory
Post has 2-3 spelling or grammatical errors; Cites work in APA format where required with few errors.
0 pts
Needs Improvement
Posts have 4 or more spelling or grammatical errors; Does not cite work where required.
context: From document: Week 3 Canvas Data Dump: — chunk 22 (chunk 22/32)
